title: CGAP Human Lung Dissociation
author: Adam Hunter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qz9dx96

steps.title: Cut lung into 1cm x 1cm...
steps.instruction: Cut lung into 1cm x 1cm sections and ensure weight is ~0.2g.

steps.title: Transfer the piece of tissue to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the piece of tissue to a 10cm petri dish and add ~250µl Digestion Medium to cover it. Digestion Media DMEM + Collagenase D (0.1ml/ml) + DNase I (10µl/ml)

steps.title: Using two scalpels, chop the piece...
steps.instruction: Using two scalpels, chop the piece inside the tube as finely as possible.

steps.title: Add ~2ml of Digestion Media and...
steps.instruction: Add ~2ml of Digestion Media and transfer the mashed tissue to a 15ml falcon tube using a 5ml stripette.

steps.title: Wash the dish with 1ml of...
steps.instruction: Wash the dish with 1ml of Digestion Medium, transferring it to the 15ml falcon tube with the tissue.

steps.title: Transfer it to an incubator at...
steps.instruction: Transfer it to an incubator at 37°C for 1 hour on a rocker (tissue from lower left lobe should be left for 30 minutes). Freeze the tissue samples at this stage CGAP Freezing Human Tissue in Isopentane by Adam Hunter

steps.title: Collect the sample and filter the...
steps.instruction: Collect the sample and filter the cells through a 100µm nylon mesh filter into a 50ml falcon tube. Using the plunger of a syringe, repeatedly mash the filter and rinse with cold Complete Medium up to 25ml. Complete Media DMEM + 10% FBS

steps.title: Spin down 360xg for 10 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Spin down 360xg for 10 min at 4°C. Acceleration 4, break 2.

steps.title: Very carefully discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Very carefully discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend the cell pellet in 25ml of Complete Medium
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cell pellet in 25ml of Complete Medium.

steps.title: Spin down 360xg for 10 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Spin down 360xg for 10 min at 4°C. Acceleration 4, break 2.

steps.title: Very carefully discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Very carefully discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 1ml of 1x Red Blood...
steps.instruction: Add 1ml of 1x Red Blood Cell Lysis solution to your cell pellet.

steps.title: Incubate 5 min on ice with periodic agitation
steps.instruction: Incubate 5 min on ice with periodic agitation.

steps.title: Add fresh cold PBS up to 10ml
steps.instruction: Add fresh cold PBS up to 10ml.

steps.title: Spin down 360xg for 5 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Spin down 360xg for 5 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 1ml of 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 1ml of 0.04% BSA and count cells.

steps.title: If percentage of live cells is...
steps.instruction: If percentage of live cells is higher than 70-80%, cells can then be processed for scRNA-seq. If percentage of live cells is below 70-80%, remove dead cells by following “MACS Live Dead Separation”. CGAP MACS Live Dead Separation by Adam Hunter

steps.title: Dilute cells to 2x10 6 cell per ml in 0
steps.instruction: Dilute cells to 2x10 6 cell per ml in 0.04% BSA and proceed to 10X Preparation for scRNA sequencing.

steps.title: Ensure all unused tissue, equipment and...
steps.instruction: Ensure all unused tissue, equipment and tubes that have been in contact with primary tissue are placed into Virkon in sweetie jar for a minimum of 1 hour. After this time aspirate and disposing in relevant sharps or waste routes.

steps.title: %s %s
steps.instruction: %s %s
